useTls.title: Use implicit TLS (SMTPS)
useTls.description: When true, connect via TLS from the start (typically port 465).

useStartTls.title: Use STARTTLS
useStartTls.description: When true, upgrade plaintext to TLS via STARTTLS (typically port 587).

fromAddress.title: Default 'From' address
fromAddress.description: Address used as the sender when a message does not provide one.
